verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There was no crown for Him Of silver or of gold There was no diadem for Him to hold But blood adorned His brow and proud Its stain He wore And sinners gave to Him the crown He wore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A rugged cross became His throne, His kingdom was in hearts alone He wrote His love in crimson red And wore the thorns upon His head

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He did not reign upon a throne of ivory, He died upon the cross of Calvary For sinners there He counted all He owned but loss And He surveyed His kingdom from His cross.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No purple robe He wore His bleeding wounds to hide But stripes upon His back He wore with pride And from the wounds there flowed A crimson cleansing stream That was a cover for the soul unclean
